title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Alternatives to Gumroad's Payout Delays — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, and you've been selling ebooks, courses, and art for years. But Gumroad's payout delays have been a constant source of frustration. You need a reliable alternative to collect payments and get your money quickly. But what are your options, and which one is best for you? Let's break down the differences between Gumroad's alternatives, so you can make an informed decision and start getting paid faster.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, and Payhip are popular payment gateways, but they have one major limitation: they exclude certain countries, including Nigeria. This means you can't use them to collect payments from your customers. Gumroad's alternatives, like NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, are designed for creators in restricted countries. They offer automated delivery, no payout delays, and support for multiple cryptocurrencies. BUT, they also come with their own set of features and limitations. For example, NOWPayments has a more extensive list of supported cryptocurrencies, but it requires a merchant account. Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, offers a more user-friendly interface and supports a wide range of cryptocurrencies, but it comes with a higher transaction fee.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Many payment gateways, including PayPal and Stripe, have strict Know-Your-Customer (KYC) requirements, which can be a major hurdle for creators in restricted countries. Gumroad's alternatives, like NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect, don't require KYC, making it easier for creators to get started. However, this also means that you'll need to handle customer support and refunds on your own, which can be time-consuming and frustrating. Additionally, some alternatives may have more restrictive terms and conditions, so be sure to read the fine print before signing up.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Gumroad's payout delays can be a significant source of frustration, with some creators waiting up to 10 days to receive their payments. Gumroad's alternatives, like NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect, offer faster payment processing, with most transactions settling within 24 hours. However, this convenience comes at a cost: higher transaction fees. Web3 Wallet Connect, for example, charges a 1.5% transaction fee, while NOWPayments charges a 2% fee. While these fees may seem high, they're worth it for the convenience and speed of getting paid quickly.
Don't let Gumroad's payout delays hold you back from getting paid quickly and easily.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automated delivery is a critical feature for digital creators, as it allows you to send your products to customers instantly, without the need for manual intervention. Gumroad's alternatives, like NOWPayments and Web3 Wallet Connect, offer automated delivery capabilities, making it easy to get your products to customers quickly. Additionally, some alternatives may offer more advanced features, such as customizable delivery receipts and automated customer support.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

The choice between Gumroad's alternatives ultimately depends on your specific needs and preferences. If you're looking for a more extensive list of supported cryptocurrencies, NOWPayments may be the better choice. However, if you prefer a user-friendly interface and lower transaction fees, Web3 Wallet Connect may be the better option. Consider your priorities and choose the alternative that best fits your needs.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Choose the payment gateway that best fits your needs, and don't be afraid to switch if needed.

Additionally, consider using Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect to integrate cryptocurrency payments into your digital product store. With its user-friendly interface and support for multiple cryptocurrencies, it's the perfect solution for creators who want to get paid quickly and easily.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with Web3 Wallet Connect, follow these steps: (1) sign up for a Web3 Wallet Connect account; (2) integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your digital product store using the provided API key; (3) set up your payment settings, including your cryptocurrency wallet and transaction fees; (4) test your payment gateway to ensure it's working properly; (5) launch your digital product store and start selling. With these simple steps, you can start getting paid quickly and easily using Web3 Wallet Connect.
Automated delivery and customizable receipts can make a huge difference in your customer experience.
